Design & Digital Services | ION Print & Promo
Affordable, professional, collaborative graphic design for small businesses across Simcoe County, Muskoka, GTA and beyond. Our ION Print & Promo design team is here for you.
Good design makes your business look its best

At ION Print & Promo, our in-house designers help local businesses and organizations look professional, without the big-agency price tag. From logos to signage, marketing materials, and everything else, we’ll make your brand strong, polished, and built to impress.

We offer a full suite of graphic design supports for every business and budget. A professional designer helps make sure every piece looks clean, balanced, branded and ready to represent you properly.

Your branding, printed materials and digital presence should reflect your brand, your message and the quality of the work you do.
Designed here. Printed here. Done right.

Our in-house graphic designers understand how designs need to be built for printing, signage and promo products.

That means your files are created with the right sizing, spacing, resolution, colours, margins and finishing requirements from the start.

Our expert team works directly with you to make the process clear, efficient and easy. Stop by our Barrie office to see samples of work or chat with one of our graphic designers to get started.
Custom printed materials with specialty finishes
Design support for every stage of your business.

Whether you are launching a new business, refreshing your brand or updating existing materials, we can help bring your ideas to life.

We take the time to understand your business, your goals and your audience so the final product feels like you and not an online template.

You'll be involved from the first concept to the final proof, making sure everything looks great and works just the way you need it to.

Glenn and his team are absolutely wonderful to work with. We do lots of work with Gibson's Digital Print Design & Sign, varying from new signage, flags and graphics to repairs for existing. They are always quick to respond and complete all work that is requested. Definitely suggest them for any future sign work.

The sign at my office was damaged by strong winds. They responded quickly, communicated clearly, repaired an older sign with great quality at a reasonable price, and put my mind at ease. Highly recommended. Always.

Cindy was super helpful and very professional in creating the lettering for my new boat. She listened to what I wanted, offered great suggestions, and delivered high-quality work. A genuinely nice person - highly recommended!

I love working with this print shop, specifically Shawn, Steve, and the always friendly Barbara. The shop offers incredible personal service, flexibility, attention to detail, fair pricing, and amazing range of offerings. They always make the process smooth, easy, and genuinely enjoyable, and I know I'm in great hands every time.

We've worked with IO Promo for several years now at Ontario Soccer, and Rob has consistently been a trusted partner - always reliable, responsive, and there when we need support. When we said we wanted to open a store, Rob reassured us he could help - and they really did!
